head.title: Laravel Cloud
head.script: window.CLOUD_ENUMS = JSON.parse('{\u0022alertTypes\u0022:{\u0022billing_threshold_reached\u0022:\u0022Monthly spend threshold reached.\u0022,\u0022cache_cpu_throttling_periods\u0022:\u0022Cache CPU throttling detected.\u0022,\u0022cache_crashing\u0022:\u0022Cache is crashing.\u0022,\u0022cache_memory_usage\u0022:\u0022Cache memory usage is above 90%.\u0022,\u0022cache_oom\u0022:\u0022Cache ran out of memory and restarted.\u0022,\u0022database_cpu_usage\u0022:\u0022Database CPU usage is above 90%.\u0022,\u0022database_crashing\u0022:\u0022Database cluster is crashing.\u0022,\u0022database_disk_usage\u0022:\u0022Database cluster disk usage is above 90%.\u0022,\u0022database_oom\u0022:\u0022Database cluster ran out of memory and restarted.\u0022,\u0022database_ram_usage\u0022:\u0022Database cluster RAM usage is above 90%.\u0022,\u0022instance_cpu_usage\u0022:\u0022Compute cluster CPU usage is above 90%.\u0022,\u0022instance_crashing\u0022:\u0022Compute cluster is crashing.\u0022,\u0022instance_disk_usage\u0022:\u0022Compute cluster disk usage is above 90%.\u0022,\u0022instance_oom\u0022:\u0022Compute cluster ran out of memory and is restarting.\u0022,\u0022instance_ram_usage\u0022:\u0022Compute cluster RAM usage is above 90%.\u0022,\u0022cache_auto_upgrade_blocked\u0022:\u0022Cache could not auto-upgrade from :current_size to :attempted_size due to your plan limit.\u0022,\u0022cache_upgraded_max_size\u0022:\u0022Cache auto upgraded due to its maximum data storage capacity being reached.\u0022,\u0022cache_upgraded_max_bandwidth\u0022:\u0022Cache auto upgraded due to its maximum bandwidth limit being reached.\u0022,\u0022cache_limit_exceeded_max_data_size\u0022:\u0022Cache exceeded its maximum data storage capacity.\u0022,\u0022cache_limit_exceeded_max_bandwidth\u0022:\u0022Cache exceeded its maximum bandwidth limit.\u0022,\u0022cache_limit_exceeded_max_commands_per_second\u0022:\u0022Cache exceeded its maximum commands per second limit.\u0022,\u0022cache_limit_exceeded_max_request_size\u0022:\u0022Cache exceeded its maximum request size limit.\u0022,\u0022cache_limit_exceeded_max_record_size\u0022:\u0022Cache exceeded its maximum record size limit.\u0022,\u0022cache_limit_exceeded_max_concurrent_connections\u0022:\u0022Cache exceeded its maximum concurrent connections limit.\u0022,\u0022cache_limit_exceeded_max_daily_requests\u0022:\u0022Cache exceeded its maximum daily requests limit.\u0022,\u0022cache_limit_exceeded_monthly_database_usage_cap\u0022:\u0022Cache exceeded its monthly database usage cap.\u0022,\u0022websocket_application_max_connections\u0022:\u0022WebSocket application is approaching its maximum connection limit.\u0022},\u0022alertActions\u0022:{\u0022billing_threshold_reached\u0022:\u0022Review your usage in the dashboard to manage your spending.\u0022,\u0022cache_cpu_throttling_periods\u0022:\u0022Consider upgrading to a larger cache size to reduce CPU throttling and improve performance.\u0022,\u0022cache_crashing\u0022:\u0022Consider upgrading to a larger cache size or check for configuration issues. If the issue persists, contact support.\u0022,\u0022cache_memory_usage\u0022:\u0022Consider upgrading to a larger cache size to avoid reaching memory limits and prevent service disruption.\u0022,\u0022cache_oom\u0022:\u0022Consider upgrading to a larger cache size if the issue persists.\u0022,\u0022database_cpu_usage\u0022:\u0022Consider upgrading to a larger CPU size to improve performance.\u0022,\u0022database_crashing\u0022:\u0022Consider upgrading to a larger CPU\\\/RAM size. If the issue persists, contact support.\u0022,\u0022database_disk_usage\u0022:\u0022Increase the database\\u0027s storage capacity to avoid a service disruption.\u0022,\u0022database_oom\u0022:\u0022Consider upgrading to a larger RAM size if the issue persists.\u0022,\u0022database_ram_usage\u0022:\u0022Consider upgrading to a larger RAM size to avoid a service disruption.\u0022,\u0022instance_cpu_usage\u0022:\u0022Consider upgrading to a larger CPU size to improve performance\u0022,\u0022instance_crashing\u0022:\u0022Check your logs for errors or misconfigurations that may be causing the compute to crash. If crashes continue, contact support for help investigating the underlying issue.\u0022,\u0022instance_disk_usage\u0022:\u0022Increase the CPU size to increase the underlying disk size or consider using an object storage bucket instead of the local disk.\u0022,\u0022instance_oom\u0022:\u0022Consider upgrading to a larger RAM size if the issue persists.\u0022,\u0022instance_ram_usage\u0022:\u0022Consider upgrading to a larger RAM size to avoid a service disruption.\u0022,\u0022cache_auto_upgrade_blocked\u0022:\u0022Upgrade your plan to upgrade to larger sizes.\u0022,\u0022cache_upgraded_max_size\u0022:\u0022Cloud automatically scaled the cache to handle increased request or record sizes.\u0022,\u0022cache_upgraded_max_bandwidth\u0022:\u0022Cloud automatically scaled the cache to allow higher levels of data transfer.\u0022,\u0022cache_limit_exceeded_max_data_size\u0022:\u0022Consider enabling auto-upgrade for your cache or manually upgrade to a larger size to avoid service disruption.\u0022,\u0022cache_limit_exceeded_max_bandwidth\u0022:\u0022Consider enabling auto-upgrade for your cache or manually upgrade to increase bandwidth limits.\u0022,\u0022cache_limit_exceeded_max_commands_per_second\u0022:\u0022Consider enabling auto-upgrade for your cache or manually upgrade to increase command throughput.\u0022,\u0022cache_limit_exceeded_max_request_size\u0022:\u0022Review your application to reduce request sizes or consider upgrading to a plan with higher limits.\u0022,\u0022cache_limit_exceeded_max_record_size\u0022:\u0022Review your application to reduce record sizes or consider upgrading to a plan with higher limits.\u0022,\u0022cache_limit_exceeded_max_concurrent_connections\u0022:\u0022Consider optimizing connection pooling in your application or upgrading to a plan with higher connection limits.\u0022,\u0022cache_limit_exceeded_max_daily_requests\u0022:\u0022Consider upgrading to a plan with higher daily request limits or optimize your application to reduce request frequency.\u0022,\u0022cache_limit_exceeded_monthly_database_usage_cap\u0022:\u0022Consider upgrading to a plan with higher monthly usage limits or optimize your database usage patterns.\u0022,\u0022websocket_application_max_connections\u0022:\u0022Consider increasing the maximum connection limit for this WebSocket application.\u0022},\u0022cacheSizes\u0022:{\u0022laravel_valkey\u0022:{\u0022valkey-pro.250mb\u0022:\u0022250 MB\u0022,\u0022valkey-pro.1gb\u0022:\u00221 GB\u0022,\u0022valkey-pro.2.5gb\u0022:\u00222.5 GB\u0022,\u0022valkey-pro.5gb\u0022:\u00225 GB\u0022,\u0022valkey-pro.12gb\u0022:\u002212 GB\u0022,\u0022valkey-pro.25gb\u0022:\u002225 GB\u0022,\u0022valkey-pro.50gb\u0022:\u002250 GB\u0022},\u0022upstash_redis\u0022:{\u0022250mb\u0022:\u0022250 MB\u0022,\u00221gb\u0022:\u00221 GB\u0022,\u00222.5gb\u0022:\u00222.5 GB\u0022,\u00225gb\u0022:\u00225 GB\u0022,\u002212gb\u0022:\u002212 GB\u0022,\u002250gb\u0022:\u002250 GB\u0022,\u0022100gb\u0022:\u0022100 GB\u0022,\u0022500gb\u0022:\u0022500 GB\u0022},\u0022fake\u0022:{\u0022250mb\u0022:\u0022250 MB\u0022,\u00221gb\u0022:\u00221 GB\u0022,\u00222.5gb\u0022:\u00222.5 GB\u0022,\u00225gb\u0022:\u00225 GB\u0022,\u002212gb\u0022:\u002212 GB\u0022,\u002250gb\u0022:\u002250 GB\u0022,\u0022100gb\u0022:\u0022100 GB\u0022,\u0022500gb\u0022:\u0022500 GB\u0022}},\u0022allCacheSizes\u0022:{\u0022250mb\u0022:\u0022250 MB\u0022,\u00221gb\u0022:\u00221 GB\u0022,\u00222.5gb\u0022:\u00222.5 GB\u0022,\u00225gb\u0022:\u00225 GB\u0022,\u002212gb\u0022:\u002212 GB\u0022,\u002250gb\u0022:\u002250 GB\u0022,\u0022100gb\u0022:\u0022100 GB\u0022,\u0022500gb\u0022:\u0022500 GB\u0022,\u0022valkey-pro.250mb\u0022:\u0022250 MB\u0022,\u0022valkey-pro.1gb\u0022:\u00221 GB\u0022,\u0022valkey-pro.2.5gb\u0022:\u00222.5 GB\u0022,\u0022valkey-pro.5gb\u0022:\u00225 GB\u0022,\u0022valkey-pro.12gb\u0022:\u002212 GB\u0022,\u0022valkey-pro.25gb\u0022:\u002225 GB\u0022,\u0022valkey-pro.50gb\u0022:\u002250 GB\u0022},\u0022cacheTypes\u0022:{\u0022laravel_valkey\u0022:\u0022Laravel Valkey\u0022,\u0022upstash_redis\u0022:\u0022Redis by Upstash\u0022},\u0022cacheEvictionPolicies\u0022:{\u0022allkeys-lru\u0022:{\u0022label\u0022:\u0022allkeys-lru\u0022,\u0022description\u0022:\u0022Keeps most recently used keys; removes least recently used keys.\u0022},\u0022noeviction\u0022:{\u0022label\u0022:\u0022noeviction\u0022,\u0022description\u0022:\u0022New values aren\\u0027t saved when memory limit is reached.\u0022},\u0022volatile-lru\u0022:{\u0022label\u0022:\u0022volatile-lru\u0022,\u0022description\u0022:\u0022Removes least recently used keys with a time-to-live (TTL) set.\u0022},\u0022allkeys-random\u0022:{\u0022label\u0022:\u0022allkeys-random\u0022,\u0022description\u0022:\u0022Randomly removes keys to make space for the new data added.\u0022},\u0022volatile-random\u0022:{\u0022label\u0022:\u0022volatile-random\u0022,\u0022description\u0022:\u0022Randomly removes keys with a TTL set.\u0022},\u0022volatile-ttl\u0022:{\u0022label\u0022:\u0022volatile-ttl\u0022,\u0022description\u0022:\u0022Removes keys with a TTL set, the keys with the shortest remaining time-to-live value first.\u0022},\u0022allkeys-lfu\u0022:{\u0022label\u0022:\u0022allkeys-lfu\u0022,\u0022description\u0022:\u0022Keeps frequently used keys; removes least frequently used keys.\u0022},\u0022volatile-lfu\u0022:{\u0022label\u0022:\u0022volatile-lfu\u0022,\u0022description\u0022:\u0022Removes least frequently used keys with a TTL set.\u0022}},\u0022cloudRegions\u0022:{\u0022us-east-2\u0022:\u0022US East (Ohio)\u0022,\u0022us-east-1\u0022:\u0022US East (Virginia)\u0022,\u0022eu-central-1\u0022:\u0022EU Central (Frankfurt)\u0022,\u0022eu-west-1\u0022:\u0022EU West (Ireland)\u0022,\u0022eu-west-2\u0022:\u0022EU West (London)\u0022,\u0022ap-southeast-1\u0022:\u0022Asia Pacific (Singapore)\u0022,\u0022ap-southeast-2\u0022:\u0022Asia Pacific (Sydney)\u0022,\u0022ca-central-1\u0022:\u0022Canada (Central)\u0022},\u0022databaseAttributes\u0022:{\u0022laravel_mysql_8\u0022:[\u0022size\u0022,\u0022storage\u0022,\u0022is_public\u0022,\u0022uses_scheduled_snapshots\u0022,\u0022retention_days\u0022],\u0022aws_rds_mysql_8\u0022:[\u0022size\u0022,\u0022storage\u0022,\u0022is_public\u0022,\u0022uses_pitr\u0022,\u0022retention_days\u0022,\u0022maintenance_window\u0022,\u0022deployment_option\u0022],\u0022neon_serverless_postgres_18\u0022:[\u0022suspend_seconds\u0022,\u0022cu_min\u0022,\u0022cu_max\u0022,\u0022retention_days\u0022],\u0022neon_serverless_postgres_17\u0022:[\u0022suspend_seconds\u0022,\u0022cu_min\u0022,\u0022cu_max\u0022,\u0022retention_days\u0022],\u0022neon_serverless_postgres_16\u0022:[\u0022suspend_seconds\u0022,\u0022cu_min\u0022,\u0022cu_max\u0022,\u0022retention_days\u0022]},\u0022databaseCpuTypes\u0022:{\u0022laravel_mysql_8\u0022:{\u0022db-flex\u0022:\u0022Database
